capabilities: Integrate AI-derived knowledge bases into testing strategies to enhance evaluation accuracy and efficiency, ensuring error-free execution and comprehensive logging.

procedure.action: Capture the specification using domain-specific tools like Swagger or Postman; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the captured specification using domain-specific tools such as JSON Schema Validator; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Inject criteria and metrics using domain-specific tools like JMeter or Gatling; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Assert the procedure output using domain-specific tools like Selenium or Cypress; ensure error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Evaluate testing strategies by integrating AI-prompting derived knowledge bases, ensuring error-free execution and logging performance metrics for auditability.
title: Testing Strategy Evaluation

failureConditions: Inaccurate testing results when AI-derived knowledge base is not integrated, causing misalignment with real-world scenarios.
Loss of auditability when operation_duration_ms and result_code are not logged, causing difficulty in tracing execution history.
Increased error rates when domain-specific tools are not used, causing invalid results and reduced confidence in testing outcomes.
metrics: the captured specification using domain-specific tools such as JSON Schema Validator
the procedure output using domain-specific tools like Selenium or Cypress
successConditions: log_contains('result_code'); assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
